title: DicomStoreMetrics
description: DicomStoreMetrics contains metrics describing a DICOM store.

blobStorageSizeBytes.description: Total blob storage bytes for all instances in the store.

instanceCount.description: Number of instances in the store.

name.description: Resource name of the DICOM store, of the form `projects/{project_id}/locations/{location_id}/datasets/{dataset_id}/dicomStores/{dicom_store_id}`.

seriesCount.description: Number of series in the store.

structuredStorageSizeBytes.description: Total structured storage bytes for all instances in the store.

studyCount.description: Number of studies in the store.
